product.name: FEMELI 2 PCS 24" Acrylic Floating Shelves, Clear Shelf for Display, Plant, Perfume, Book in Bedroom Living Room Office, 5mm Thick Wall-Mounted Acrylic Shelves for Wall
features: Sturdy: FEMELI acrylic shelves are made of high quality clear acrylic with a thickness of 5mm, the acrylic shelves are fixed to the wall with attached screws and anchors to perfectly withstand the weight of the items, you can easily install these shelves on your wall and put the items you want to display

Well-made: FEMELI acrylic floating shelves use a unique polishing technique to make the shelves look very translucent and clear. Each acrylic shelf is protected by an individual white plastic film to prevent scratches during delivery to you

Multi-purpose: FEMELI clear shelves is available in 6 different sizes to meet your different purpose. It not only provides extra space to store your household items and cosmetics, but also can be used to decorate your space and beautifully display various things you love, such as artwork, photos, dolls, 3D puzzles, models, collectibles, etc

Stylish and Elegant: The unique floating design and clear acrylic material make FEMELI wall shelf blend well with your bathroom, bedroom, living room, kitchen, office, garage and any other space, your items or artwork look like they are floating in the air, this makes your space look neat and stylish

100% Guarantee: FEMELI provides 30 days replace and refund service, if there is any need for us, please contact our after-sales service team, we will give you a 100% satisfactory answer, please feel free to buy
